channel.title: software design on savchenko.tech
channel.description: Recent content in software design on savchenko.tech

item.title: The Fast Way or The Right Way: Do We Really Need A Strategy?
item.description: AI agents write code fast. Very fast. “The fast way” has never been more seductive. Get the feature working. Ship it. Move on. Every shortcut feels justified. There’s a deadline. The workaround is “temporary.” So you add a few annotations and look the other way: @SuppressWarnings “GodClass”, “TightCoupling”, “TooManyParameters”. The technical debt will be paid back “later”. Business loves it. Arguments about code that’s “harder to change in the future” rarely land.
